_comment: SAVED FOR LAUNCH DAY. This is the real Atelier Homepage Portal content that was in templates/index.json before it was temporarily replaced with the luxury-coming-soon gate page for pre-launch. Shopify does NOT read this file automatically (the homepage only ever uses templates/index.json) -- when you're ready to go live, copy everything below the _comment key into templates/index.json, replacing what's there, then push/publish.
